\tzpentry{ID3687}{Trajectory Chemical Potential Tensor Coupling}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3687 introduces Trajectory Chemical Potential Tensor Coupling as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mu_2[i,j \to k] : \text{Trajectory}[i,j] \otimes \text{Trajectory}[j,k] \to \text{Trajectory}[i,k] \end{equation}
